name: Corsair WS3000 3000W ATX 3.1 Fully Modular Workstation Power Supply - 80 PLUS Platinum Certified - 140mm Dual Ball Bearing Fan - 4x 600W 12V-2x6 (12+4-PIN) Connectors - 8x PCIe 6+2-pin Connectors (CP-9020312-NA)

description: 3000W fully modular workstation power supply with 80 PLUS Platinum certification and quad 12V-2x6 connectors for extreme professional builds.
